name: ES8388
description: ESPHome's es8388 audio DAC platform to play media from your devices and to configure microphone inputs.

config_entries.label: Address
config_entries.description: The I²C address of the driver. Defaults to `0x10`.

config_entries.label: I2C ID
config_entries.description: The ID of the [I²C bus](https://esphome.io/components/i2c) the ES8388 is connected to.
